## Product Brief
1. Secureworks offers a suite of managed security services (MSS) to extend security operations for 24x7 support.
2. Their core technology includes the cloud-native security platform Taegis, which detects advanced threats, streamlines investigations, and automates corrective actions.
3. Secureworks differentiates itself through its focus on cybersecurity, leveraging over 20 years of real-world threat intelligence and research to provide comprehensive security solutions.
